title: Marco Rubio meets Pope Leo amid tensions with Trump over Iran war
summary_full: Leo, the first American pontiff, drew Trump's ire after becoming a firm critic of the war and the administration's hardline immigration policies.
summary_public: Leo, the first American pontiff, drew Trump's ire after becoming a firm critic of the war and the administration's hardline immigration policies.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: tensions with Trump over Iran war
